penalties.description: Video shows Task 1 (Peg Transfer) not Task 2 (Pattern Cut)

confidence_rationale: Video clearly shows Task 1 (Peg Transfer) with rubber objects being moved between pegs, not Task 2 (Pattern Cut) with gauze cutting. No cutting activity observed throughout the video.
cannot_determine: Pattern cutting accuracy - no cutting performed
Gauze cutting technique - wrong task performed
Circular pattern adherence - no pattern cutting attempted
technique_summary: Video shows Task 1 (Peg Transfer) performance rather than Task 2 (Pattern Cut). No cutting activity was observed on the suspended gauze.
improvement_suggestions: Ensure correct task identification before beginning
Focus on gauze cutting rather than object transfer for Task 2
